case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS AARON ROSEN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FISH CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $770.97 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT AARON ROSEN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FISH CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AARON ROSEN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FISH CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AARON ROSEN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FISH CO. $770.97 PRINCIPAL, $14.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
